name: 红一方面军
leader: 毛泽东、周恩来、朱德、张闻天、王稼祥、彭德怀等
description: 中央红军主力。1934年10月从中央苏区战略转移，1935年10月到达陕北。
nameEn: Red First Front Army / Central Red Army
leaderEn: Mao Zedong, Zhou Enlai, Zhu De, Zhang Wentian, Wang Jiaxiang, Peng Dehuai, Lin Biao, etc.
descriptionEn: Main column of the Central Red Army, departing from the Central Soviet Area in October 1934 and reaching northern Shaanxi in October 1935.
subUnits: 红一军团; 红三军团; 红五军团; 红八军团; 红九军团; 中央军委纵队; 红三十四师
subUnitsEn: 1st Corps; 3rd Corps; 5th Corps; 8th Corps; 9th Corps; Central Military Commission Column; 34th Division

name: 红二十五军
leader: 程子华、吴焕先、徐海东等
description: 鄂豫皖根据地重要力量，1934年11月从河南罗山何家冲出发，最早到达陕北。
leaderEn: Cheng Zihua, Wu Huanxian, Xu Haidong, etc.
descriptionEn: A force from the Hubei-Henan-Anhui base area, among the earliest Red Army columns to reach northern Shaanxi.
subUnits: 红二十五军第七十三师; 红二十五军第七十四师; 红二十五军第七十五师; 北上抗日第二先遣队
subUnitsEn: 73rd Division; 74th Division; 75th Division; Second Northern Anti-Japanese Advance Detachment

name: 红四方面军
leader: 徐向前、陈昌浩、张国焘、李先念等
description: 由川陕根据地转移，经历嘉陵江战役、懋功会师、南下挫折、甘孜会师，1936年10月与红一方面军会宁会师。
leaderEn: Xu Xiangqian, Chen Changhao, Zhang Guotao, Li Xiannian, etc.
descriptionEn: A major Red Army force from the Sichuan-Shaanxi base area, later converging with the First and Second Front Armies.
subUnits: 红四军; 红九军; 红三十军; 红三十一军; 红三十三军; 妇女独立团
subUnitsEn: 4th Corps; 9th Corps; 30th Corps; 31st Corps; 33rd Corps; Women's Independent Regiment

name: 红二方面军
leader: 贺龙、任弼时、萧克、关向应、刘伯承等
description: 1935年11月从湘鄂川黔根据地出发，1936年7月正式组成红二方面军，10月到达将台堡。
leaderEn: He Long, Ren Bishi, Guan Xiangying, Xiao Ke, Wang Zhen, etc.
descriptionEn: The Second and Sixth Corps departed from Sangzhi in 1935 and were later reorganized as the Second Front Army.
subUnits: 红二军团; 红六军团; 红三十二军; 红十八师; 红十六师

name: 陕甘红军
leader: 刘志丹、谢子长、习仲勋、徐海东等
description: 陕甘边、陕北根据地革命武装，为中央和各路红军长征提供落脚点。
nameEn: Shaanxi-Gansu Red Army and revolutionary base
leaderEn: Liu Zhidan, Xie Zichang, Xi Zhongxun, Gao Gang, etc.
descriptionEn: The northwestern revolutionary base that became the landing point for the Long March.
subUnits: 红二十六军; 红二十七军; 红二十八军; 红十五军团; 陕北游击队; 陕甘边游击队
subUnitsEn: 26th Army; 27th Army; 28th Army; 15th Corps; Northern Shaanxi guerrillas; Shaanxi-Gansu border guerrillas

name: 国民党军
leader: 蒋介石及各路追堵部队
description: 用于半透明灰色路线示意长征途中敌军追击、封锁、围堵与压迫态势。此路线为概括性叙事层，不代表精确战斗部署。
leaderEn: Chiang Kai-shek, Xue Yue, He Jian, Long Yun, Hu Zongnan and related forces
descriptionEn: A schematic grey layer showing pursuit, blockade, encirclement and pressure against Red Army routes; not a precise deployment map.
subUnits: 中央军; 湘军; 桂军; 滇军; 黔军; 川军; 西北军; 马家军
subUnitsEn: Central Army; Hunan troops; Guangxi troops; Yunnan troops; Guizhou troops; Sichuan troops; Northwest Army; Ma clique forces
